roa.docketEntryComment: DA'SSUPPLEMENTAL TO PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED 20 ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES AS  TERM OF DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT,/SATERM/X:THE PLEA OF NOLO CONTENDERE IS WITHDRAWN AND THE MATTER IS DISMISSED,/MO PC 1385:68/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/X:PROOF OF COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES ISPROVIDED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL,/X:FUTURE HEARING DATE OF 10-31-19 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL - PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT: DEF ENT OF JUDG DEF ENTERS NLPL/AMEND:3/AMENDCOM:PC 242/DEFT ADV NL:3/REMA/CTORD:AS CONDITIONS OF THEDEFERRED ENTY OF JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT SUFFER ANY NEW CHARGES, DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE 20 ANGER  MANGEMENT CLASSES TO BE MONITORED BY PTD,/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:AUGUSTIN ANDRADE/SAORD4:100 YARDS/X: UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF DEJ, DEFENDANT MAY WITHDRAW NL PLEA AND COUNT 3 WILL BE DISMISSED,
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:SDT RECORD RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE/LD:11-02-18/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 3 IS GRANTED - INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CONT/DEF:REMAINS ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/
/CAL: TRIAL READINESS CONFERENCE/X: THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/NP/X: THE CASE HAS BEEN PRE-TRIED AND THE 10-22-18 TRIAL DATE IN DEPT, 17 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & MOT TO AMEND/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND IS GRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE FILED SECOND AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT/AMENDCOM: COUNT 001, 415(2) PC A MISD, COUNT 002, 245(A)(4) PC A MISD, COUNT 003, 242 PC A MISD/FAWC/IRRC/NTW/LDTR:11-02-18/CONTD:TRIAL READINESS IND13 ON 10-12-18/CONTD:TRIAL IN D17 ON 10-22-18/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ON A 2HR STANDBY FOR TRIAL READINESS AND TRIAL/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/JAVS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/987,2/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DAWF/CTORD:FEE HEARING/SA1:ANDRADE JESUE AGUSTIN/SAORD4:4/SAORD/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL - PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:TODAY'S PROCEEDING WAS NOT REPORTED AND RECORDED,/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL: CONTINUANCE HEARING/X: MAINTAIN LAST DAY OF 11-02-18/TE: 4 DAYS/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/
/CAL:TRIAL/JAVS/ /LD:11-02-18/CONT/DEF:REMAINS ON A STANDBY/X:MEDICAL RECORD IS RELEASED TO PEOPLE,/SA1:OLIVIA LENHART/SAORD4:100/SAORD/
